## How to use

1. Copy this template to `docs/job-descriptions/JD-XXX-NNN-Role-Name.md`
2. Assign JD ID per [job-descriptions/INDEX.md](../job-descriptions/INDEX.md)
3. Link owned procedures in §4
4. Obtain executive approval before publishing to HRIS
5. Record appointment date in RACI matrix when filled
